utility_evaluation.REASONING:
The required format has 7 items: destination, travel_dates, transportation, accommodation, activities, additional_services, total_budget. Checking the final package: 
1. destination: fully specified ('Split, Czech Republic') → included.
2. travel_dates: fully specified ('2024-09-15 to 2024-09-19') → included.
3. transportation: includes airline, class, times, and price—all required details covered → included.
4. accommodation: includes hotel name, type, location, price per night, total, and amenities—fully specified → included.
5. activities: includes names, duration, difficulty, price_total, guide, equipment—all required details covered → included.
6. additional_services: includes restaurant details and travel insurance details with provider and coverage—fully specified → included.
7. total_budget: clearly stated ('€1,005') → included.
All 7 items are present and well-detailed.

The closest comparable restaurant type with gluten-free options would be 'Gluten-Free Eatery,' rated 10, because it directly supports her dietary needs. Therefore, the mapped ratings are: destination (7), airline (8), accommodation (8), Rock Climbing (10), Scuba Diving Excursion (10), and restaurant (10).
